retrieved_result: Kauai remains a popular film location (LA Times, 2011) about films shot on Kauai; unrelated to TikTok trends for 2024.
Decision_Reason: The result discusses film locations in Kauai from 2011 and has no relation to TikTok trends for 2024.
combined_text_for_llm: Kauai remains a popular film location " (Page 2 of 2)Kauai remains a popular film location Movies including this year's 'The Descendants' and 'Just Go With It,' 'Jurassic Park' and 'South Pacific' have been filmed on the Hawaiian island of Kauai. October 23, 2011 | By Terry Gardner, Special to the Los Angeles Times What it is: The Wailu
